name: Savory Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Tsp. crushed basil, oregano or savory
1/3 C. coarsely crushed crumbs (croutons, crackers, cereal crumbs, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stem ends from tomatoes and cut the tomatoes in half.
2. Arrange the cut sides up in a circle on a 10-inch pie plate or dinner plate.
3. Mix the crumbs and herbs; mound on top of the tomatoes.
4. Microwave uncovered on High for 2 minutes, then rotate the dish by half.
5. Sprinkle the tomatoes with cheese.
6. Continue microwaving until the tomatoes are hot and the cheese is melted, about 2 more minutes.
7. Garnish with parsley if desired.
